intents.intent_description: Handle user input that doesn't match any other defined intent, providing a fallback response to keep the conversation flowing.
intents.name: Default fallback intent

intents.intent_description: Provide assistance and information about the bot's capabilities when the user requests help or asks what the bot can do.
intents.name: Help

utterances.utterance: I would like some help, please.
Would you be able to help me?
Can you provide details on how you may assist?

intents.intent_description: Escalate the conversation to a human agent when the user requests to speak with a real person or human support.
intents.name: Agent

utterances.utterance: Can I talk to a human?
I need to speak to a person
Please transfer me to a human agent
I want to talk to support
Can you connect me to a real person?

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user is ending the conversation with a farewell or departure expression.
intents.name: Goodbye

intents.intent_description: Respond appropriately when the user initiates conversation with a greeting or salutation, including hellos, time-based greetings, and casual farewells.
intents.name: Greetings

intents.intent_description: Handle user feedback indicating dissatisfaction with the bot's response, including complaints about inaccuracy, irrelevance, confusion, or general unhelpfulness.
intents.name: Not helpful

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user expresses gratitude or thanks.
intents.name: Thank you
A - Food Types We DO NOT Offer
intents.template_key: A - We DO NOT serve those food types

intents.name: B - Ingredients We DO NOT Offer
intents.template_key: A - We DO NOT serve these ingredients

quick_reply.text:
So far you are ordering a ${entity.foodType} with ${entity.toppingChoice1}

Do you want any other toppings or ingredients?

So far you are ordering a ${entity.foodType} with ${entity.toppingChoice1} and ${entity.toppingChoice2}

Do you want any other toppings/ingredients?

elements.description:
Congratulations ${consumerData.extra_params.name} on ordering a ${entity.foodType} with ${entity.toppingChoice1}, ${entity.toppingChoice2} and ${entity.toppingChoice3}.  

An email will be sent to ${consumerData.extra_params.email} when your order is ready.

For this demonstration, you are out of toppings/ingredients!  Test the Handled or Escalated path using the buttons below:
elements.title: Pizza Carousel

elements.title: Calzone Carousel Reply

quick_reply.text:
So far you are ordering a ${entity.foodType} with ${entity.toppingChoice1}, ${entity.toppingChoice2} and ${entity.toppingChoice3}

For this demonstration, you are out of toppings/ingredients!  Test the Handled or Escalated path using the buttons below:

First topping on your ${entity.foodType}?

Select 3 toppings in the following screens to complete the cheezy bot demo.

First ingredient in your ${entity.foodType}?

Select 3 toppings in the following screens to complete the cheezy bot demo.

Which toppings would you like on your 
${entity.foodType}?

text:
Sorry, we do not serve ${nlp.text} as an ingredient or topping.

Type ${entity.foodType} to continue.

We don't serve Tiger Steak here at Eat More Ciao, but as we've heard:

They're Grrreat!!!

Type Hello to start over

Sorry, we do not offer ${nlp.text}  at Eat More Ciao Pizza and Calzones. 

Type hello to return to the Initial Agent Greeting via the Welcome Intent.

Hang on whilst we connect you with a Pizza/Calzone specialist.

This is using the default Agent Handover response.
Choose one of the following or provide your own
Sorry, I am unable to understand your message. Could you please rephrase it?

Ciao ${consumerData.extra_params.name}!

Type Bye to exit the Bot Loop in the flow

Hey, this is one of the sample intents which can be recognised. Intents are the user scenarios or flows which the bot can complete, while entities are the parameter which are required to complete and intent. Go ahead and configure a new intent to get started.
Sorry,  I hear that wasn't able to help you. Please try asking a different question.

Are you trying to add an ingredient, or replace an ingredient?

(Cheating, and using the Partial match object for this step, since the options match, consider using different Quick Reply Payload values as a possible fix).  Interesting note, the CC version of the Agent does not seem to like quotes in the append conversation node.
You can also see the results for

Hello ${consumerData.extra_params.name}, Welcome to:  
Eat More Ciao - Pizza and Calzones!

This is a Welcome Message Text Response.

Would you like to order a Pizza or a Calzone?

Try stuff we don't serve, like corndogs or tiger steak!
